title: Hessian Ribbon 50mm x 20 Meters, 2” Wide Natural Jute Country Rustic Burlap Craft Ribbon Roll for Gift Wrapping, Crafting, Wreath Making, Christmas Decorations (10m/Roll)
features: VALUE FOR MONEY: You will get 2 rolls of hessian ribbon, each 5 cm wide and 10 meters long. Enough to meet your packaging and decoration needs
MATERIAL: The burlap ribbon is made of natural jute with double stitched edges, flexible and durable, reusable
JUTE WRAPPING RIBBON: classic vintage linen color, can be used for gift box wrapping, Christmas gift wrapping, birthday gift wrapping, crafts wrapping
RUSTIC DECORATIVE RIBBON: Natural ribbon with simple vintage style, perfect for decorating Christmas wreaths, Easter wreaths, Christmas trees, gift baskets and rustic wedding decorations, etc
HESSIAN CRAFT RIBBON: This can be used to make bows, jute crafts, Christmas cards, wedding invitations, rolled glass bottles, wrapped around bouquets or cakes, etc
EASY TO USE: You can cut the jute ribbon into any length and shape as you need, easy to create the decorative effect you want
description: Product Description The hessian ribbon made of natural jute has a strong farmhouse atmosphere, it is always refreshing to use for wrapping or decorating, it is ideal for DIY or decorating. Great for decorating gifts, Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, vases, birthday parties, weddings and more! SPECIFICATION: Material: jute Color: Brown Length: 10 m/roll Width: 5 cm/2 cm Package included: 2 rolls of hessian ribbon GXFCING Hessian Ribbon 50mm x 20 Meters, 2” Wide Natural Jute Ribbon Roll, Co...
